ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sleep study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the sleep study */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of study (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the sleep study */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used in the sleep study */,
  "preregistered" INTEGER /* Indicates if the study was preregistered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sleep study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sleep study */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source of the study */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution conducting the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "pi" INTEGER /* Principal Investigator's ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_pi FOREIGN KEY ("pi") REFERENCES investigators ("pi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the participant is involved in */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the participant */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the participant */,
  "sleep_disorder" INTEGER /* Indicates if the participant has a known sleep disorder */,
  "consent_form" TEXT /* File path to the participant's consent form */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical result */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the result is associated with */,
  "term" TEXT /* Term or variable being analyzed */,
  "statistic" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., mean difference, SE, t, df, p) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "extra" TEXT /* Extra information or notes about the statistic */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for statistical analysis */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the statistical result */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value of the statistical test */,
  "effect_size" REAL /* Effect size of the result */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size used in the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_results_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_results_statistic FOREIGN KEY ("statistic") REFERENCES statistics ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_results_method FOREIGN KEY ("method") REFERENCES methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistical method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the statistical method */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Mathematical formula used in the method */,
  "references" TEXT /* References or citations for the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of statistic */,
  "statistic_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the statistic */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Mathematical formula for the statistic */,
  "references" TEXT /* References or citations for the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study version */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the version is associated with */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of changes in the version */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_versions_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, statistician, clinician) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the study */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the study was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the study */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the report is based on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the report */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was approved */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the collaboration is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigators" (
  "pi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each principal investigator */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the principal investigator */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the principal investigator */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the principal investigator */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the principal investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pi_id")
)
